mapper.select: SELECT * FROM store_menu WHERE menu_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{menuName},'%')
SELECT * FROM store_menu WHERE store_idx = #{storeIdx} AND menu_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{menuName},'%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_menu( store_idx, menu_name, menu_description, menu_price, menu_status, display_order ) VALUES ( #{storeIdx}, #{menuName}, #{menuDescription}, #{menuPrice}, 'HIDDEN', #{displayOrder} )
